<!-- Thanks for contributing to Trailmark! -->

## What changed

<!-- A one- or two-sentence summary of the change. -->

## Why

<!-- The reason for the change — the problem it solves or the value it adds.
     Link to an issue if one exists, e.g. "Closes #123". -->

## How this was tested

<!-- How did you verify the change? At minimum:
     - Loaded the unpacked extension in Chrome
     - Walked through the affected flow (record / annotate / export / settings)
     - Confirmed no regressions on the unrelated paths you touched -->

- [ ] Loaded the extension unpacked and tested the change end-to-end
- [ ] No new errors in the service worker console (chrome://extensions → Trailmark → service worker)
- [ ] No new errors in the page console where a content script runs

## Screenshots / recording (UI changes only)

<!-- Drop images or a short screen recording here. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] My change is focused — no drive-by refactors, reformats, or unrelated fixes
- [ ] I did not add dependencies (Trailmark is intentionally build-free)
- [ ] I updated documentation if user-visible behavior changed
